extra.reason: Decision recorded: native Swift/SwiftUI (iOS 18 min) for the app. Relay service language decided: Rust (axum/tokio) to match desktop-core expertise, shared protocol crate at remote/protocol. Desktop bridges: Rust, std::thread (no tokio in desktop app).

Protocol spec (specs/REMOTE_PROTOCOL.md) + flightdeck-remote-protocol crate: two-plane design (plaintext relay frames / opaque E2E envelopes), Ed25519 challenge-response auth, per-pairing seq+ack+resume+dedup, command idempotency by command_id, 45 golden JSON fixtures as cross-language contract. Gates verified: test/clippy/fmt clean.

ios/ scaffold: XcodeGen project (iOS 18.0, iPhone-only, dark-only, SwiftTerm linked), app/unit/UI test targets, feature folder architecture, theme tokens, URL scheme + usage descriptions. Verified BUILD+TEST SUCCEEDED on iPhone 16 Pro / iOS 18.4 sim from clean state.

remote/relay axum service: healthz/readyz/version/ws endpoints, env config, tracing, graceful shutdown, distroless Dockerfile (verified 38MB image runs), ACA deploy config + gated CI workflow. Full workspace gates verified green. Azure provisioning deferred (needs credentials).

ios Security/: DeviceIdentity (SE P-256 with software fallback, Keychain persistence AfterFirstUnlockThisDeviceOnly, deterministic deviceId=b64url(SHA256(pubkey))), KeychainStore wrapper. 5/5 tests green on sim (SE path exercised). Cross-language interop proven: iOS SE signature verified by Rust p256 crate.

DesignSystem/ tokens + components (StatusDot glow/pulse, WorkingSpinner, StatusPill, CardStyle, GitIndicatorText, NotificationCell), Geist fonts bundled+verified, component gallery (DEBUG) with screenshot at ios/.derived/gallery.png. 20 unit + 2 UI tests green. Visual side-by-side sign-off vs mockup deferred to human review.

Radar & blip icon generated programmatically (ios/scripts/generate-icon.swift -> 1024px no-alpha PNG in AppIcon.appiconset), visually verified. BadgeController utility (setBadgeCount + auth request + clamping) with tests. Build + 40 unit tests green.

Relay core complete: P-256 challenge-response auth state machine w/ timeout, zero-knowledge pairing-id routing (ciphertext never decoded — proven by test), per-(pairing,sender) gapless-seq queue with ack-prune/resume-replay/dedup/bounded-overflow, RelayStore persistence seam (in-memory v1). Protocol gap closed with pairing_offer/pairing_offer_ok frames + fixtures. 29 unit + 9 integration tests; full workspace gates verified.

Relay core complete: P-256 challenge-response auth state machine w/ timeout, zero-knowledge pairing-id routing (ciphertext never decoded — proven by test), per-(pairing,sender) gapless-seq queue with ack-prune/resume-replay/dedup/bounded-overflow, RelayStore persistence seam (in-memory v1). Protocol gap closed with pairing_offer/pairing_offer_ok frames + fixtures. 29 unit + 9 integration tests; full workspace gates verified.

Relay core complete: P-256 challenge-response auth state machine w/ timeout, zero-knowledge pairing-id routing (ciphertext never decoded — proven by test), per-(pairing,sender) gapless-seq queue with ack-prune/resume-replay/dedup/bounded-overflow, RelayStore persistence seam (in-memory v1). Protocol gap closed with pairing_offer/pairing_offer_ok frames + fixtures. 29 unit + 9 integration tests; full workspace gates verified.

src/remote/: blocking-tungstenite relay client thread (no tokio; 100ms socket timeout pump), P-256 identity w/ spec-exact encodings, ~/.flightdeck/remote.json state (0600), backoff+jitter reconnect, 20s latency pings, seq assign/dedup/auto-ack. Disabled by default (zero behavior change). 27 unit tests + 3 mock-relay drills; live handshake vs real relay proven. Full desktop gates verified: 492+2+19 tests, clippy, fmt.

Satisfied by the shipped architecture: routing is keyed purely by (pairing_id, role); a phone activates multiple pairing_ids on one connection (auth_response.pairing_ids: Vec); spec §10 documents multi-Mac as a UI-only addition with no protocol change. Verified in relay core implementation + tests.

Custom tab bar (Projects/Activity/+FAB/Shell/Settings) w/ raised orange FAB + Activity unread dot; AppRouter entry routing (unpaired->Pairing, paired->main) over PairingStateProviding seam; typed deep-link parser + pendingDeepLink; ProjectsNavModel typed path. 40 unit + 7 UI tests green on sim.

E2E channel pinned in spec §7.1 and implemented both platforms: static-static P-256 ECDH -> HKDF-SHA256 (salt=pairing_secret/claim_token, per-direction info) -> ChaCha20-Poly1305 with AAD=pairing_id:seq:sender:sent_at_ms. Cross-language vectors checked in; Swift derives byte-equal keys, opens Rust ciphertexts, seals byte-identical, rejects tamper. Rust 500 tests green; iOS 54 tests green. FS deferred per PRD §13.

src/remote/{feed,transcript,notifier,bridge}.rs: pure feed builders w/ delta fingerprinting + PRD roll-up precedence; ANSI-strip line-stream transcript w/ redraw dedupe, activity-pill heuristics, permission-preview capture on needs-input edge, 500-item ring + pagination; typed finished/needs-input/error events mirroring notify_phase w/ grace window; per-tick bridge with SealFn/OpenFn crypto seam (passthrough until E2E wired). 59 new unit tests; full gates green (556 lib tests).

src/remote/{feed,transcript,notifier,bridge}.rs: pure feed builders w/ delta fingerprinting + PRD roll-up precedence; ANSI-strip line-stream transcript w/ redraw dedupe, activity-pill heuristics, permission-preview capture on needs-input edge, 500-item ring + pagination; typed finished/needs-input/error events mirroring notify_phase w/ grace window; per-tick bridge with SealFn/OpenFn crypto seam (passthrough until E2E wired). 59 new unit tests; full gates green (556 lib tests).

src/remote/{feed,transcript,notifier,bridge}.rs: pure feed builders w/ delta fingerprinting + PRD roll-up precedence; ANSI-strip line-stream transcript w/ redraw dedupe, activity-pill heuristics, permission-preview capture on needs-input edge, 500-item ring + pagination; typed finished/needs-input/error events mirroring notify_phase w/ grace window; per-tick bridge with SealFn/OpenFn crypto seam (passthrough until E2E wired). 59 new unit tests; full gates green (556 lib tests).

PairingView per PRD §5.6: 4-digit segmented entry (hidden TextField technique), QR scanner w/ simulator/permission fallbacks, loading/error/shake states, E2E footer. fdr1: base64url QR payload format defined; PairingServicing contract documented for transport task; MockPairingService for UI. 70 unit + 13 UI tests green.

AppLockController (@Observable, persisted toggle default-off, deviceOwnerAuthentication policy w/ passcode fallback, fail-open on passcode-less devices, auto-attempt-once per lock episode, scenePhase re-arm) + AppLockView overlay covering pairing AND main. 10 unit + 2 UI tests; full suite 70 unit/13 UI green on settled tree. Settings toggle wiring documented.

Wire namespace Swift mirror of full protocol (hand-rolled tagged/flattened Codable, explicit nulls, 9 id types) validated 47/47 golden fixtures via generated-source embedding; RollupModel w/ PRD precedence (needs_input>working>manual>idle), desktop-summary passthrough, exact summary string forms. 154 tests green.

src/remote/commands.rs + lib.rs wiring: CommandLedger idempotency (dup->original outcome), pure translate() to Command dispatch / targeted PTY writes, evidence-based permission keymaps (Claude 1/Esc, Codex y/Esc, OpenCode Enter/Esc, unknown->honest reject), stale-prompt guards, never-force-kill close (CtrlCPrimary/IfAllStopped), new-agent via begin_new_agent_tab+worker with first-task bracketed-paste delivery, real acks from actual outcomes. 22 new tests; 578 lib + 21 others green.

src/remote/commands.rs + lib.rs wiring: CommandLedger idempotency (dup->original outcome), pure translate() to Command dispatch / targeted PTY writes, evidence-based permission keymaps (Claude 1/Esc, Codex y/Esc, OpenCode Enter/Esc, unknown->honest reject), stale-prompt guards, never-force-kill close (CtrlCPrimary/IfAllStopped), new-agent via begin_new_agent_tab+worker with first-task bracketed-paste delivery, real acks from actual outcomes. 22 new tests; 578 lib + 21 others green.

TransportClient actor (hello->auth->resume->live, backoff+jitter reconnect, 20s pings, seq dedup + cumulative ack, gapless outbound seq, open-before-cursor-advance), TransportStore @Observable facade w/ snapshot folding + delivery honesty (sending/delivered/failed 10s timeout), KeyAgreementKeys, PairingRecordStore, RealPairingService + mock/real factory. LIVE integration test vs real relay passed: pairing + sealed envelopes both directions. 122 unit + 13 UI green.

Desktop pairing surface: palette 'Pair Phone'/'Unpair Phone', TUI overlay w/ scannable half-block QR + 4-digit code + countdown + status; pairing state machine; claim_token_hint protocol ext (relay honors 4-digit hints, rate-limits claims); E2E goes LIVE on pairing (real seal/open replaces passthrough, AAD-bound seq). SALT CONTRACT PINNED: always claim_token UTF-8 bytes both paths (spec §7.1). 589 desktop + full relay tests green.

Features/Connection/: ConnectionIndicator (compact/full, latency phrasing <100 low/<400 ok/slow), ReconnectingBanner (paired && !connected, 30s 'Still trying' escalation w/ injectable clock, safe-area animated, production-wired to live TransportStore via MainTabView), CommandsPausedGate as pause source of truth for compose/approve controls, -uitest-linkstate seam. Full suite green: 25 UI tests, all unit suites.

Features/Connection/: ConnectionIndicator (compact/full, latency phrasing <100 low/<400 ok/slow), ReconnectingBanner (paired && !connected, 30s 'Still trying' escalation w/ injectable clock, safe-area animated, production-wired to live TransportStore via MainTabView), CommandsPausedGate as pause source of truth for compose/approve controls, -uitest-linkstate seam. Full suite green: 25 UI tests, all unit suites.

ProjectsListView (rollup dots, accent bar, pills, aggregate subtitle, search, honest waiting state, deep-link consumption incl. link-before-snapshot) + SessionsListView (needs-input-first sort, git indicators in Geist Mono, running time, waiting-question preview, New agent CTA reusing FAB sheet). TransportStoreFactory composes the single production TransportStore; DEBUG fixture snapshot seam. 207/207 unit, 6/6 own UI tests across 3 runs.

AgentChatView: cleaned transcript (prose bubbles, tappable activity pills w/ Geist Mono detail expand, permission cards w/ orange glow + disabled action seam, sparse timestamps), auto-scroll w/ jump-to-latest, entry scroll-to-pending-prompt, pagination, Agent·Shell switcher (Shell 'soon'), inert compose seam, live TransportStore binding + deterministic fixture seam. 232 tests green.

Git: pull_base/merge_back(two-phase, dirty-base->Rejected honestly)/abandon(confirm_name verified) via guarded Command dispatch only; GitStatusDetail rides every snapshot from cached WorktreeStatus. Shell: reuses Command::OpenShell child-terminal machinery (container-aware), 4KB UTF-8-safe chunks w/ per-shell seq, one-shell-per-session cap, interrupt/close/exit events, teed via drain_pty_output, sealed-envelope flush. 609 lib + 21 tests green.

ChatComposeBar (growing field, paused-gating w/ honest label, mic->dictation, voice seam), optimistic append w/ echo-reconciliation heuristic, delivery honesty (sending/sent/failed + tap-to-retry; retry reuses command_id after silent timeout — desktop dedups — new id only after observed rejection), live PermissionPromptCard (spinner, Allowed/Denied collapse, stale 'already answered' state). 278/278 unit; own UI tests green. Also fixed real tab-bar-over-compose-bar hit-testing bug.

ChatComposeBar (growing field, paused-gating w/ honest label, mic->dictation, voice seam), optimistic append w/ echo-reconciliation heuristic, delivery honesty (sending/sent/failed + tap-to-retry; retry reuses command_id after silent timeout — desktop dedups — new id only after observed rejection), live PermissionPromptCard (spinner, Allowed/Denied collapse, stale 'already answered' state). 278/278 unit; own UI tests green. Also fixed real tab-bar-over-compose-bar hit-testing bug.

Implemented end-to-end: TransportClient CommandHandle tracks sending/delivered(outcome)/failed w/ 10s timeout and never sends when link is down; chat compose + permission cards surface 'not delivered — retry' with dedup-safe retry semantics (same command_id after silent timeout, new id after observed rejection); CommandsPausedGate disables all state-changing controls while reconnecting. Verified by ChatSendLogicTests + transport delivery tests.

iOS registration + relay APNs sender implemented and tested (cargo + iOS unit). Real device delivery needs an Apple .p8 key (APNS_* env + --features apns-live) and a signing DEVELOPMENT_TEAM — deployment config, not code.

Fixed: TransportStore now uses a single FIFO AsyncStream + serial loop for ordered event delivery; Chat commandsPaused distinguishes unbound gate (DEBUG assert at view setup) from a down link. Tests added, full suite (407) green.
